title: fragaria vulgaris var. muricata
intro: Fragaria vulgaris var. muricata, also known as the wild strawberry or mountain strawberry, is a rare and lesser-known species of the Fragaria genus, which is a type of wild strawberry native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Fragaria vulgaris var. muricata include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may contribute to its use in traditional medicine for various health issues. The health benefits of this plant are said to include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Fragaria vulgaris var. muricata can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
